quickLinks.description: Freely available research from around the world

quickLinks.title: Publish with Us
quickLinks.description: Submit your research to our trusted journals

callForPapers.title: Edge-Computing AI for Medical Devices
callForPapers.description: Electronic medical devices can be implantables, wearables, and remote. These devices can collect various multimodal and multigrain bio-signals invasively or non-invasively.

callForPapers.title: Interruption of Amino Acids Supply as Anti-Tumor Strategy
callForPapers.description: The interruption of amino acids supply has emerged as a promising anti-tumor strategy, with research focusing on the metabolic vulnerabilities of cancer cells.

callForPapers.title: Photothermal Membranes for Water Treatment
callForPapers.description: This topical collection showcases the latest developments in photothermal materials and their applications in solar-driven water treatment and desalination technologies.

trendingResearch.title: Quantum Entanglement Dynamics in Multi-Particle Thermal Systems
trendingResearch.summary: We investigate the evolution of entanglement entropy in closed quantum systems undergoing thermalization.

trendingResearch.title: CRISPR-Cas9 Off-Target Effects in Mammalian Genome Editing
trendingResearch.summary: Comprehensive analysis of non-target cleavage sites reveals high-frequency off-target activity.

trendingResearch.title: Urban Heat Island Dynamics and Green Infrastructure Mitigation
trendingResearch.summary: A comparative study of thermal patterns in 50 global cities and mitigation strategies.

trendingResearch.title: Evidence for active volcanism on Venus from Magellan radar data
trendingResearch.summary: Analysis of Magellan radar images provides direct evidence for active volcanism on Venus.

trendingResearch.title: Biofilms: from the cradle of life to life support
trendingResearch.summary: A comprehensive review of biofilm formation and its implications for biotechnology.
